steps.title: Rewrite in standard form
steps.content: The first equation becomes $54x-117y=30$. The second equation becomes $18x+ry=\frac{1}{5}$. For no solution, the $x$- and $y$-coefficients must be proportional but the constants must not follow that same ratio.

steps.title: Use the coefficient ratio
steps.content: The $x$-coefficient changed from $54$ to $18$, a scale factor of $\frac{1}{3}$. Apply the same factor to the $y$-coefficient: $$r=\frac{1}{3}(-117)=-39$$

steps.title: Confirm no solution
steps.content: The constants are not proportional because $\frac{1/5}{30}=\frac{1}{150}$, not $\frac{1}{3}$. So the lines are parallel and distinct. The answer is -39.
